channel.title: COF — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on COF (Capital One Financial) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: EXITED COF (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) exited COF in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED COF (+65%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added COF in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED COF (-60%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed COF in Q4 2025 · 1.9% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)
